test_cases.name: SQL Injection Vulnerability
test_cases.input: function login(user) { db.execute('SELECT * FROM users WHERE name = ' + user); }
evaluator_criteria: Must identify a SQL injection vulnerability.
Must suggest using parameterized queries or prepared statements.
Output must be formatted with Markdown headers.

test_cases.name: Off-by-one Error
test_cases.input: function printArray(arr) { for (let i = 0; i <= arr.length; i++) { console.log(arr[i]); } }
evaluator_criteria: Must identify an off-by-one error in the loop condition (i <= arr.length).
Must suggest changing the condition to i < arr.length.
Must mention that the current code will result in an undefined or out-of-bounds access on the last iteration.
